name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-41
title: contract.md provides.commands lists rabbit-config.md which Inv 25 forbids (spec/contract contradiction)
description: docs/spec/contract.md line 14 declares: 'commands': [{'path': '.claude/commands/rabbit-config.md', 'subcommands': [...]}]. Spec Inv 25 (spec.md L165-166) explicitly forbids this file's existence: 'The slash-command file commands/rabbit-config.md does NOT exist... The deleted command file MUST NOT be recreated.' The contract advertises a file the spec forbids. Either remove the rabbit-config.md entry from contract.md provides.commands (since /rabbit-config is now skill-only), or revise Inv 25. Also contract.md invokes section lists '.claude/features/contract/scripts/relink.sh' and 'dispatch-feature-edit.sh' (.sh files) — contradicts the Python-only never-list at line 64.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
